summary: Tested Assigned Categories and Assigned Products multi-select checkbox lists in User Management. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). All 8 frontend UI tests passed. Categories/Products checkbox lists work in Add User and Edit User forms. Table shows Categories and Products columns. Data filtering by assigned_categories and assigned_products works correctly for non-admin users.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login returns access_token
Backend: Agent login returns access_token
Backend: GET /api/users returns assigned_categories and assigned_products fields
Backend: PUT /api/users/{id} with assigned_categories and assigned_products saves correctly
Backend: PUT /api/users/{id} - categories and products persist after GET
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with assigned_categories and assigned_products saves correctly
Backend: GET /api/loans filters by assigned_categories and assigned_products for non-admin users
Backend: Admin sees all loans without filtering
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns assigned_categories and assigned_products
Backend: GET /api/master/categories returns list of categories
Backend: GET /api/master/products returns list of products
Backend: GET /api/master/banks returns list of banks
UI: User Management page loads with Categories and Products columns in table
UI: Add User button opens dialog
UI: Add User form shows Assigned Categories checkbox list when role=Agent
UI: Add User form shows Assigned Products checkbox list when role=Agent
UI: Add User form shows Assigned Banks checkbox list when role=Agent
UI: Edit User form opens for Test Agent
UI: Edit User form pre-fills assigned categories (SECURED, UNSECURED)
UI: Edit User form pre-fills assigned products (Home Loan, LAP)
UI: Edit User form pre-fills assigned banks (SBI, HDFC Bank)
UI: Category/Product checkbox interactions work correctly
UI: Agent login shows filtered data (only matching categories/products)

test_credentials.agent: agent@mhpfintech.com / Admin@123 (assigned: SECURED, UNSECURED categories; Home Loan, LAP products; SBI, HDFC Bank banks)

backend_apis.PUT /api/users/{id}: Accepts and saves assigned_categories and assigned_products
backend_apis.POST /api/auth/register: Accepts and saves assigned_categories and assigned_products
backend_apis.GET /api/users: Returns assigned_categories and assigned_products for each user
backend_apis.GET /api/loans: Filters by assigned_categories and assigned_products for non-admin users

UserManagement.jsx.table_columns: Categories and Products columns visible in user table
UserManagement.jsx.add_user_form: Assigned Categories and Assigned Products checkbox lists with data-testid
UserManagement.jsx.edit_user_form: Pre-fills assigned categories and products from user data
UserManagement.jsx.checkbox_interactions: Select/deselect categories and products works correctly
UserManagement.jsx.selected_tags: Shows selected items as removable tags below checkbox lists

data_filtering.agent_view: Agent only sees loans matching their assigned categories AND products
data_filtering.admin_view: Admin sees all loans without filtering

context_for_next_testing_agent: Assigned Categories and Assigned Products features fully tested and working in User Management. Test Agent user has assigned_categories=['SECURED','UNSECURED'], assigned_products=['Home Loan','LAP'], assigned_banks=['SBI','HDFC Bank']. The filtering logic in GET /api/loans checks if user has assigned_categories/products and filters accordingly. Master data: 6 categories, 6 products, 97 banks. All checkbox lists use data-testid attributes for testing.
